variants: Evgeny Nedelko is an accomplished inventor known for his revolutionary work in the field of data security. Residing in Olivebee Point, he originally hails from Cobaltfern Village. He authored the Dragonvine Encryption Core, a notable advancement that has established his reputation in technology. In recognition of his innovative contributions, Evgeny was awarded the Jasmine Loom Emblem. Outside of his professional offerings, he actively participates in the Yellowfin Aquarists Guild, nurturing his enthusiasm for marine aquariums and aquatic life.
